name: CFTR 317kb TAD (ENCODE A549 CTCF + H3K27ac)
description: 317kb window spanning the CFTR TAD on chr7. TISSUE-MATCHED CONFIG: A549 lung adenocarcinoma (CFTR-relevant lung epithelial). H3K27ac from ENCODE A549 vehicle control (ENCFF548GIF, ENCSR000AUI, IDR optimal narrowPeak, GRCh38). CTCF from ENCODE A549 (ENCFF535MZG, experiment TBD, GRCh38). Purpose: compare tissue-matched vs K562 baseline to quantify enhancer divergence effect on Class B detection in lung epithelial context.

enhancers.name: CFTR_intron11_strong_H3K27ac
enhancers.note: STRONGEST H3K27ac in window (Peak_14605, 117581657-117583540, signal=13.51, score=648, 1.9kb). Within CFTR intron 11. Co-localizes with literature DHS. MANUALLY CALIBRATED occupancy — highest signal in window

enhancers.name: CFTR_intron11_upstream_H3K27ac
enhancers.note: Weak H3K27ac upstream of intron 11 peak (Peak_53273, 117580583-117581484, signal=3.17). MANUALLY CALIBRATED occupancy

enhancers.name: CFTR_intron12_H3K27ac
enhancers.note: Moderate H3K27ac in CFTR intron (Peak_26510, 117587686-117588273, signal=6.86). MANUALLY CALIBRATED occupancy

enhancers.name: CFTR_intron12_secondary_H3K27ac
enhancers.note: Moderate H3K27ac 1kb downstream of intron 12 peak (Peak_30320, 117588541-117589338, signal=5.71). MANUALLY CALIBRATED occupancy

enhancers.name: CFTR_intron14_weak_H3K27ac
enhancers.note: Weak H3K27ac (Peak_47629, 117604891-117605232, signal=4.04). MANUALLY CALIBRATED occupancy

enhancers.name: CFTR_intron14_H3K27ac
enhancers.note: Moderate H3K27ac (Peak_32002, 117605417-117605810, signal=5.67). MANUALLY CALIBRATED occupancy

enhancers.name: CFTR_intron14_strong_H3K27ac
enhancers.note: Moderate H3K27ac cluster (Peak_33932, 117605918-117606425, signal=5.80). Three peaks within 2kb — active enhancer region. MANUALLY CALIBRATED occupancy

enhancers.name: CFTR_3prime_H3K27ac
enhancers.note: Moderate H3K27ac downstream of CFTR (Peak_36180, 117682527-117683879, signal=5.08, 1.4kb). MANUALLY CALIBRATED occupancy

enhancers.name: TAD_boundary_H3K27ac
enhancers.note: Weak H3K27ac near 3-prime TAD boundary (Peak_42791, 117715530-117715890, signal=4.01). Co-localizes with strong CTCF. MANUALLY CALIBRATED occupancy

ctcf_sites.name: CFTR_promoter_CTCF
ctcf_sites.note: Moderate CTCF near CFTR TSS (117481083-117481299, score=1000). Not present in K562 CTCF at this exact position. MANUALLY CALIBRATED

ctcf_sites.name: 3prime_TAD_boundary_CTCF
ctcf_sites.note: STRONGEST CTCF in window (117715918-117716056, score=1000, signal=194.81). Co-localizes with K562 CTCF 3' TAD boundary (signal=110.67). 1.76x stronger in A549. MANUALLY CALIBRATED

enhancer_divergence.note: K562 baseline used LITERATURE enhancers (CFTR silent in K562, no K562 H3K27ac peaks). A549 has real ChIP-seq peaks — mostly in CFTR introns 11-14. COMPLETE enhancer divergence expected: K562=literature vs A549=real ChIP-seq.

ctcf_divergence.note: Only 2 CTCF sites in A549 window (vs 6 in K562). The 3' TAD boundary is shared (1.76x stronger in A549). A549 adds promoter-proximal CTCF absent in K562.

thresholds.note: Copied from K562 config. NOT recalibrated for A549.

_config_note: TISSUE-MATCHED CONFIG for CFTR/A549 comparison experiment. Created 2026-03-10. A549 is lung adenocarcinoma — relevant tissue for CFTR (cystic fibrosis = lung epithelial disease). Note: A549 H3K27ac is vehicle control (EtOH), not strictly untreated.
